description: Square toed brown shoes with slip on styling Full grain leather upper with stitch detailing, stitches along the seams of the toe box, reinforecd overlay at the heel collar, elasticated inserts on the tongue Padded tongue and footbed, removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Outsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel as a heel guard Rubber outsole with a curved midfoot, upraised heel, deep grooves and suction points
